item.title: Land Deal - 0.26 acres in Interlachen, FL — two homes allowed on one lot?
item.description:
Most land makes you pick one type of home. This one doesn't — mobile, tiny, container, or site-built, and there's even room for two.

→ See photos & full details: https://lotsofsunshine.com/lot/13-10-24-4080-0030-0180

This is a 0.26-acre parcel on Maverick Trail in Interlachen, FL — zoned R-2 Two-Family in Putnam County. No HOA. Power at the street. Total flexibility to build the way you want, when you want. And sitting right in the middle of lake country with more than 20 lakes nearby, Rodman Reservoir just down the road, and Carl Duval Moore State Forest practically at your back door.

item.description:
Build a home, bring a mobile or manufactured house, or simply hold a piece of North Florida while the Suwannee River corridor quietly does what good land always does.

→ See photos & full details: https://lotsofsunshine.com/lot/3724-240


This is 2.6 acres in Jennings, Florida — right off I-75 at the Georgia line, where cypress and pine line the riverbanks and land still makes financial sense. Rural Residential zoning means you can build a site-built home or place a mobile or manufactured home. Road access is already in. Jasper is 12 miles away, Valdosta is 20 minutes north, and Big Shoals State Park — Florida's only Class III whitewater — is a short drive south.
